ham.subject: Your Flipkart Order #1234567890 has been shipped – Track Now
ham.body:
Dear Customer,

Thank you for shopping with Flipkart! Your order #1234567890 has been successfully placed on 2026-04-07. Here are the details:

• Item: Sony Bravia 55" LED TV
• Quantity: 1
• Price: ₹35,999.00

Your order is now out for delivery. It will be delivered to the address you provided within 2-3 working days.

Track your package here: <URL>

If you have any questions, feel free to reply to this email or contact our support.

Thanks and enjoy your new TV!

Best Regards,
Flipkart Customer Support

spam.subject: Urgent: QuickBooks Invoice Payment Reminder – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear QuickBooks User,

We regret to inform you that your QuickBooks Invoice #QB-INV-2026-0045 remains unpaid. The due date was 2026-04-01, and the total amount due is $2,500.00.

If the payment is not received within the next 48 hours, your QuickBooks subscription will be suspended and you may lose access to your accounting data.

Please log in and complete the payment immediately to avoid service interruption:

<URL>

For any questions, reply to this email or call our support at 1800-123-456.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Best,
QuickBooks Billing Team
